_comment: Generic Claude Code settings for a research project. Copy to your project's .claude/settings.json and adapt.

permissions._comment_allow: Commands Claude can run without asking for confirmation each time. Add your project's standard tools here.
permissions._comment_deny: Commands Claude should never run without explicit user instruction.

hooks._comment: Hooks run shell commands automatically at specific events. Test each hook manually before relying on it.

PreCompact._comment: Runs before Claude compresses the conversation context. Use to save current state.

PostToolUse._comment: After pushing to GitHub, automatically mirror to GitLab. Adjust matcher to your primary remote name.
